list.vod_blurb: &nbsp;The 12th season of the New Zealand drama series â€œThe Brokenwood Mysterieâ€‌ will begin streaming
list.vod_content: The 12th season of the New Zealand drama series â€œThe Brokenwood Mysterieâ€‌ will begin streaming on Acorn TV April 6. Subsequent installments of the six-episode season will be released on Mondays through May 11. As Brokenwoodâ€™s murder rate continues to rise, and strange conspiracies and deadly secrets begin to emerge, Detective Mike Shepherd (Neill Rea, The Warriorâ€™s Way) and his team use unconventional methods to unravel the townâ€™s most bizarre and chilling murder investigations yet.
